globalProduct.definition: Global multi-country multi-language crypto exchange availability- and bonus-intelligence platform
globalProduct.promise: For your country and in your language: which exchanges genuinely work, which codes are genuinely eligible, what is genuinely restricted — with dated evidence

axes.country: factual — which market's MI decisions render
axes.language: presentational — which locale renders; never implies country
axes.visual: owner-approved CountryVisualProfile per covered country, one consistent art style

differentiators: per-country visual identity without flag-spam or fabricated localism

informationArchitecture.spine: header (Exchanges · Promo Codes · How We Verify · country control · language switch) + footer; RegionAvailabilityModule on all commercial surfaces; CountryMasthead on country surfaces

globalContractRules: First Screen Conversion Standard v1 absolute
canonical MI decisions via approved adapters only; never staging/RECOVERED packages
country and language are independent fields (countryCode/countrySlug/languageCode/localeTag; URL prefix derived, never one locale variable)
no IP-based hard redirects on SEO pages
market-first routes only for matrix-supported market-language pairs

market-language pairs, defaults, fallbacks and x-default targets come from the explicit extensible MarketLanguageMatrix (KZ default ru; PL default pl incl. uk/ru; DE default de; English = fallback, never assumed default); page variants gated by PageLocaleCoverage

pageFamilies.purpose: Country-resolved, locale-rendered front door: best eligible exchanges + codes
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: resolver precedence URL→manual→saved→IP→global; rows re-scope; coverage-honest
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: full UI+editorial translation; identical rankings/data per country across locales
pageFamilies.countryVisualBehavior: subtle resolved-country masthead accent in hero; platform-neutral art for global default
pageFamilies.firstScreen: compact hero + country control + Top-3 desktop / Top-2 mobile eligible RANKING_ROWs with complete code+Copy+CTA (56px header incl.)
pageFamilies.commercialGates: only ranking-eligible rows monetized; MI promo/CTA gates; never padded
pageFamilies.bottomConversion: compact recap of top eligible rows (permitted states only)
pageFamilies.seo: brand + head terms per locale; canonical per locale; hreflang cluster with x-default → /
pageFamilies.mobile: two eligible rows fully commercial in first viewport; ≥44px targets; no overflow
pageFamilies.restrictedBehavior: restricted only in separated informational section

url.prohibited: /kz/{lang}/countries/kazakhstan/ duplicate — 301 to market root, never indexed

pageFamilies.purpose: Market homepage and country verdict hub are ONE surface: /kz/ru/ (and siblings) is the canonical Kazakhstan market root; duplicate /kz/{lang}/countries/kazakhstan/ prohibited
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: URL pins country (precedence rank 1); resolver suggestions link, never redirect; market root carries full market ranking + verdict
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: fully localized copy; identical facts per country; locale switch preserves country
pageFamilies.countryVisualBehavior: primary CountryVisualProfile surface: masthead (desktop/mobile art) + accent palette; textless evergreen art
pageFamilies.firstScreen: compact masthead + country identity + evidence status + verdict + top eligible rows (3/2)
pageFamilies.commercialGates: country-verified eligibility only (G+MI gates); publication owner-gated per country
pageFamilies.bottomConversion: COMPACT_BOTTOM of leading eligible exchange or alternatives module
pageFamilies.seo: country head terms per locale; hreflang across locale variants
pageFamilies.restrictedBehavior: own dated section; never in ranking

pageFamilies.purpose: Browse/filter all covered exchanges with availability badges
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: badges re-resolve per resolved country; availability filters
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: localized chrome/labels; identical result set per country
pageFamilies.countryVisualBehavior: neutral surfaces; resolved-country name chip only
pageFamilies.firstScreen: H1 + region context + search/filters + one featured eligible row when evidence allows
pageFamilies.commercialGates: compact code chip + CTA per eligible row; no forced featured offer
pageFamilies.seo: indexable hub; crawl spine; hreflang cluster
pageFamilies.mobile: filters collapse; codes copyable; one row per line
pageFamilies.restrictedBehavior: clearly badged; zero claim controls; alternatives links

pageFamilies.purpose: Canonical exchange entity page (THREE_ZONE_FIRST_SCREEN): full evaluation + authorized conversion
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: RegionAvailabilityModule renders resolved-country state; both offer blocks swap together
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: localized editorial; identical facts per (exchange × country) across locales
pageFamilies.countryVisualBehavior: none by default; resolved-country chip in availability module
pageFamilies.firstScreen: Zone1 identity (tile 132/108/92 + name below + state + trust) · Zone2 verdict+conversion (code+Copy 48–52px, CTA 48–52px, note) · Zone3 compact facts; mobile 8-item stack
pageFamilies.commercialGates: full standard state rules; MI + offer registry gates
pageFamilies.seo: primary money terms per locale; hreflang across variants
pageFamilies.restrictedBehavior: red state + reason + evidence date + View Available Alternatives; zero commercial controls

url.primary: /kz/{lang}/exchanges/{exchange}/ (= market review; pair intent fulfilled there)

pageFamilies.purpose: '{exchange} in {country}' intent fulfilled by the market exchange page (pair facts inherent in route); no competing deep-passport page; optional availability evidence subpage owner-gated with distinct purpose
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: URL pins country; module shows pair state only
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: localized presentation of identical canonical MI cell facts
pageFamilies.countryVisualBehavior: compact country accent chip/mini-masthead; exchange brand primary
pageFamilies.firstScreen: pair identity + exact local state + local verdict + locally verified code/Copy/CTA or restriction presentation
pageFamilies.commercialGates: local evidence only; global never overrides local restriction
pageFamilies.seo: pair long-tail; per-pair publication GO; hreflang per variant
pageFamilies.mobile: local verdict + state-correct action first screen

pageFamilies.purpose: Direct answer: code, eligibility, reward, application
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: claimable only for verified-compatible resolved country; else Check Eligibility
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: localized terms copy; identical offer facts
pageFamilies.firstScreen: exchange+scope · offer status · complete code+Copy+CTA · key condition · last-checked; no editorial wall
pageFamilies.commercialGates: offer registry + MI promo eligibility; unverified compat → no code + explicit statement
pageFamilies.mobile: code+CTA fully in first screen at all required viewports

pageFamilies.purpose: Decide between exchanges in the user's market
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: both compared in same resolved market; per-exchange state badges
pageFamilies.firstScreen: both COMPARISON_CELL offers (CARD_L 76px, equal treatment) with complete controls per eligible cell
pageFamilies.commercialGates: winner monetized only if eligible; restricted never monetized nor favored
pageFamilies.mobile: cells stack; two compact offers first-screen target; table scrolls in container

pageFamilies.purpose: Task completion (buy, deposit, withdraw, P2P, KYC)
pageFamilies.countryBehavior: embedded commercial module resolves country; steps stay neutral
pageFamilies.localeBehavior: fully translated steps; screenshots may stay EN with localized captions until localized capture
pageFamilies.firstScreen: title + first useful step; commercial guides MAY carry one relevant eligible COMPACT offer
pageFamilies.commercialGates: module obeys full state rules; neutral guides never forced to show a code
pageFamilies.restrictedBehavior: no claim language for restricted exchanges anywhere

url.status: owner-gated; nested under market exchange route

pageFamilies.purpose: Why {exchange} is restricted in {country} + eligible alternatives
pageFamilies.countryVisualBehavior: country accent chip only; restrained informational surface
pageFamilies.firstScreen: restricted identity (unrecolored tile) + red state + reason + evidence date + first eligible alternatives (3/2)
pageFamilies.commercialGates: conversion belongs exclusively to eligible alternatives
pageFamilies.seo: restriction long-tail; per-pair GO; hreflang cluster
pageFamilies.mobile: reason + first alternative early; two alternatives first-screen target
pageFamilies.restrictedBehavior: restricted exchange itself: zero commercial controls, no inaccessibility claims
prohibited: any promo/registration control for the restricted exchange

url.market: /kz/{lang}/methodology/ with market-specific verification context (distinct intent, cross-linked)

pageFamilies.purpose: Trust engine: evidence, states, rankings, rechecks
pageFamilies.searchIntent: is CBW trustworthy / how ranked + localized
pageFamilies.firstScreen: H1 + trust statement + verification principles + last-updated
prohibited: commercial links blended into methodology claims

rolloutOrder: W3 Country/market root + RegionAvailabilityModule + CountryVisualProfile pilots (KZ/PL/DE; art generation separately authorized)
W5 Market exchange pages (pair intent) — needs MI pilot data
W7 Locale infrastructure + Kazakhstan pairs (/kz/ru/, /kz/kk/, /kz/en/; default ru)
W8 Poland pairs (/pl/pl/, /pl/uk/, /pl/ru/, /pl/en/; default pl) + Germany pairs (/de/de/, /de/en/; default de) + RTL audit
W9 Production migration waves per family (separately authorized)
productionMigrationPlan: prototype → owner visual approval → committed authority → data-binding (approved MI adapters; no staging) → localization pass → production QA (CI gate matrix) → owner production GO → migrate live route → post-deploy live QA → monitor; production pages and GEO-legacy path frozen until per-family/pair GO; one canonical data layer, N locale presentations
urlArchitecture: market-first × language-second: /{countrySlugLower}/{languageCodeLower}/… (language-first model rejected; see SEO doc rejectedPatterns)

lifecycle.note: implementation and production remain separately unauthorized
